meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no understanding of APIs (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no understanding of APIs. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: no understanding of APIs

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Solve API Integration for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master API integration for your freelance clients. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship high-quality apps in record time.
content.answer_block: Stop struggling with complex API documentation. The Antigravity project template abstracts boilerplate networking logic, allowing you to focus on business value. By pairing it with Claude Code, you can scaffold production-ready API integrations in minutes, ensuring your freelance projects are scalable, maintainable, and delivered ahead of schedule.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank screen, a looming deadline, and a mountain of API documentation that reads like ancient hieroglyphics. Every hour spent debugging authentication handshakes is an hour stripped from your profit margin. Clients don't care about the plumbing; they care about the product.

The Antigravity project template is your architectural shortcut. It turns the complexity of API communication into a predictable, repeatable pattern, effectively shielding you from the 'no understanding' trap. Let’s bypass the technical debt and get straight to shipping.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Setting up the project structure correctly is the foundation for modular API consumption.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity template optimized for RESTful API consumption with TypeScript.

steps.title: Define API Schemas
steps.description: Translate your API requirements into strict types to prevent runtime errors during development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a zod schema for the target API response based on the provided OpenAPI specification.

steps.title: Configure Auth Interceptors
steps.description: Centralize your authentication logic to ensure every request is signed correctly without repetitive code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an Axios interceptor within the Antigravity template that attaches the Bearer token from environment variables.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'add auth interceptor to api client'

steps.title: Build Data Fetching Hooks
steps.description: Abstract the data fetching layer into reusable hooks to keep your UI components clean and thin.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom React hook that utilizes the Antigravity client to fetch and cache data with SWR.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate swr hook for endpoint /users'

steps.title: Implement Error Boundaries
steps.description: Ensure your application handles API failures gracefully, maintaining a professional experience for the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a global error handler for the API layer that logs errors and displays user-friendly toast notifications.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'add global error boundary to api client'

pro_tips: Always validate incoming API data with Zod schemas at the edge to prevent 'undefined' errors from propagating through your UI.
Use environment variables for all API keys; never hardcode credentials, even in development, to maintain security hygiene.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' feature before committing to ensure the generated API logic follows DRY principles.
Create a local 'mock' server within Antigravity to develop your frontend while the backend team is still building the actual endpoints.
Cache your API responses locally using indexedDB if your client requires offline functionality or high performance.
content.next_steps: Once your API layer is functional, focus on deploying your app to a provider like Vercel or Railway to demonstrate immediate value to your client.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting API complexity dictate your project timeline. Use the Antigravity template to standardize your workflow, increase your billable efficiency, and impress clients with production-grade code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
